name: Matter Card
description: A legal matter summary card showing client, status, budget burn, key deadlines, assignees, and outstanding tasks for law firm pipeline management.

standard.description: Full-detail matter card with title, client, status, budget burn bar, deadline chip, assignees, and open task count for dashboard usage

compact.description: Single-row compact list presentation showing matter number, client, status pill, and next deadline for high-density table views

kanban.description: Vertical stackable card optimized for kanban pipeline columns with status-colored border and drag-handle affordance indicator

visual_brief: A rectangular card with matter number shown small and monospace at top-left (e.g. 'M-2026-0147') and matter title in bold sans-serif below. Client name in smaller muted text beneath title. Top-right corner holds a status badge pill with semantic colors (Active: blue, Pending: amber, Closed: gray, Billing: purple). Middle section shows a horizontal budget bar with label 'Budget' on left, spent amount and total right-aligned in monospace (e.g. '$47,320 / $80,000'). Bar fill color transitions green to amber to red as utilization crosses 70% and 90% thresholds. Below budget bar: next deadline chip with calendar icon, deadline label, and urgency color (red if <7 days, amber if <30). Bottom-right shows stacked overlapping assignee avatar circles (up to 4 visible, +N indicator if more). Bottom-left shows outstanding task count badge (e.g. '3 open tasks'). Kanban preset adds a colored left border matching status, and a small drag-handle icon at top.

layout_hints.note: Card is clickable (d-interactive). Budget numbers in monospace. Status badge always includes status word text, never color-only.
layout_hints.deadline_urgency: Deadline chip color escalates automatically: red <7 days, amber <30 days, neutral otherwise.

slots.matter-title: Top section with matter number (monospace small) above matter title (bold sans-serif).
slots.client-info: Muted-text line beneath title showing client name and matter type subtitle.
slots.status-badge: Top-right pill showing matter status with semantic color coding and text label.
slots.budget-bar: Horizontal progress bar showing spent/total budget with color escalation thresholds.
slots.deadline-chip: Chip below budget bar with calendar icon, next key date, and urgency-colored background.
slots.assignee-avatars: Stacked overlapping avatar circles in bottom-right showing assigned attorneys with overflow counter.

keyboard: Space: toggle matter selection (in list views)

responsive.mobile: Card stacks vertically with assignees moving below task count. Compact preset auto-selected.
responsive.tablet: Standard preset retained. Assignee stack limited to 3 visible.

ambient.overdue-pulse: deadline chip background pulse when overdue 2s ease-in-out infinite

composition.MatterCard: Card(d-surface, data-interactive) > [Header > [MatterTitle > [MatterNumber(mono) + MatterTitle] + StatusBadge] + ClientInfo + BudgetBar + DeadlineChip + Footer > [TaskCount + AssigneeAvatars]]
